description_long: This chaise features a modern, boxy silhouette with a deep seat and high, enveloping back and armrests. The upholstery is a combination of two shades of blue, with the seat and inner backrest in a lighter blue and the outer shell in a darker blue. The armrests and backrest are thickly padded, providing a sense of comfort and support, and the seat cushion appears plush and inviting. The legs are slender, black, and metal, giving the piece a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with smooth, unadorned surfaces and a focus on geometric forms. This chaise would be well-suited for urban parks, modern public lounges, or stylish sidewalk seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with thick blue upholstery, high padded arms and back, and slender black metal legs. The design is minimalist and comfortable, with a two-tone blue color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, inviting seat, thick armrests, and the two-tone blue upholstery.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the high armrest, and the slender black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous dark blue outer shell and the curvature of the backrest.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the high armrest and the plush seat cushion.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is high, thickly padded, and curves gently around the sides to form a continuous shell with the armrests. It is smooth, unsegmented, and features no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Both sides have thick, high armrests that are integrated with the backrest, forming a continuous, boxy enclosure.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of black metal, with a minimalist design and no decorative elements. They are positioned at the corners and slightly elevate the chaise above the ground.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored, featuring a two-tone scheme with light blue on the seat and inner surfaces, and dark blue on the outer shell. The fabric appears smooth and untextured.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, plush seat cushion and a matching back cushion, both integrated into the frame. The cushions are thick and appear to be fixed in place, providing a uniform and structured appearance.
